title: Section 8
content: The President and members shall receive such allowances, if any, 1[from the Institute of which they are the President and members] as may be prescribed by rules. 2[Provided that in case a person is a President of two or more Institutes, the allowances shall be borne by the Institutes in such proportion as may be prescribed by rules.]
footnote: 1 Subs. by s. 9, ibid., for from the Institute (w.e.f. 16-7-2012). 2 Ins. by s. 9, ibid. (w.e.f. 16-7-2012).
